title: Small businesses protest for bigger scope
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - A small group of...
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - A small group of protesters from Mmusi Maimane's political party Bosa (Build One SA), Small Business Alliance Garden Route, together with Blanco Business Chamber and a few subcontractors, voiced their grievances this morning, Monday 3 March, with protest action in front of George Municipality.


> The group is currently addressing a few municipal officials, the police and the media regarding what they believe is discrimination towards small businesses and subcontractors.


Grievances with the municipality's indigent policy have also been raised.

A memorandum will be handed over to George Municipality. The protest is peaceful, but feisty.


> Videos:



> Video: Nobuntu Hlazu-Webster wraps it in a nutshell.


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.


> Video: Nobunto Hlazo-Webster, deputy leader and Member of Parliament, Bosa.


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Bongani Tonisi (Bosa)

Acting Direcor Community Safety Lee-Anne Meiring receives the memorandum.

Previous article: Picket outside George Municipality over SMME policies

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
